rows.protocol_note: Workload: Paged-Attention decode. Operation: attention decode (seq_q = 1) over a paged KV cache -> gather K/V pages -> scores -> softmax -> weighted-sum. Hardware: NVIDIA H800, 80GB HBM3 @ 3.35 TB/s. Metric: memory-bound Model Bandwidth Utilization (MBU). Baseline: PyTorch eager, 3+ separate kernels, 8.03 ms. Table note: each row is a measurement-driven decision; agent keeps changes that improve latency and reverts those that do not. Output summary: 8.03 ms -> 1.36 ms, 94% MBU, matches FA3, 5.90x faster.

rows.evidence_quote: Figure 23 p.36 reports paged-attention decode workload (BF16 in-kernel compute (match reference numerics)), MBU for Seed2.1 / Triton kernel = 90%.
